---
title: "Tasnim Rida"
about: 
  template: jolla
  image: assets/headshot.jpg
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ridatasnim@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tasnim-rida/
---

Hi! I’m Tasnim, a Statistics graduate from Carnegie Mellon University with a minor in Media Design, currently working as a software engineer. I’m passionate about using my background in data analysis, experimental design, and visualization to help people make sense of complex information through intuitive design. I’m particularly interested in opportunities where I can combine my analytical and design skills to create user-centered, data-driven products.
